title: Knight Frank nombra socios a cuatro directivos en España
summary: Promociona a la categoría de socio a cuatro directivos de la filial española, incluido el CEO. El plan de Knight Frank pasa por crecer un 67% en cinco años en España. Leer

title: BlackRock sube la apuesta a máximos en Telefónica
summary: BlackRock sigue dando pasos adelante en el capital de Telefónica y se consolida como cuarto mayor accionista. Leer

title: Las inversiones con más rentabilidad esperada a un año vista
summary: El inminente cambio de semestre lleva a las firmas a actualizar sus perspectivas sobre los mercados. UBS rediseña sus estimaciones para los próximos 12 meses, para mediados de 2027, con rentabilidades esperadas fuera de la Bolsa de hasta un +29%. Leer

title: El Servicio Geológico de EEUU estima entre 10.000 y 100.000 muertos por los terremotos de Venezuela
summary: El USGS, que registra la actividad sísmica en todo el mundo, ha calculado que hay un 42% de posibilidades de que el número de fallecidos se sitúe en esa franja. Leer

title: Terremoto en Venezuela: las imágenes de la tragedia
summary: La presidenta encargada de Venezuela, Delcy Rodríguez, informó este jueves que al menos 32 personas han perdido la vida y más de 700 resultaron heridas como consecuencia de dos terremotos de magnitud 7,2 y 7,5 que sacudieron el Caribe del país, causando daños materiales aún no cuantificados. Rodrígu

title: Record-breaking heatwave linked to 212 deaths in Spain
summary: A record heatwave that has gripped much of Europe could be linked to 212 deaths in Spain between Sunday and Wednesday, according to estimates from a public institute.

title: Today in Spain: A roundup of the latest news on Thursday
summary: Heatwave to ease from Thursday, far-right leader accuses PM of "manoeuvring to steal upcoming elections", US court rules out asset freezes against Spanish national team, and more news from Spain on Thursday 25th June.

title: 'People are at risk': Europe urged to invest in healthcare as heatwaves intensify
summary: The heatwave gripping Europe is putting people's health at risk, and the continent's leaders must invest in making their health services more climate-resilient, the WHO chief said Wednesday.

title: CONFIRMED: Spain breaks June heat record
summary: Mainland Spain this week recorded its highest daily average temperatures in June since at least 1950 as a heatwave gripped much of Europe, national weather agency Aemet said Wednesday.

title: LISTED: Spain's new rules for bike, motorbike and e-scooter riders
summary: Spain has made a raft of changes to its traffic rules, with many important updates for motorcyclists, cyclists and e-scooter riders as well as motorhome and regular motor vehicle drivers.

title: Spain's PM denies Socialist corruption as 'widespread' as media and opponents claim
summary: Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez on Wednesday dismissed allegations of "widespread corruption" against his Socialist Party after an ex-top aide was jailed for a corruption scandal that risks toppling the government.

title: What's behind the recent spike in drownings in Spain?
summary: Five children and seven adults drowned in Spain over the weekend, as well as nine more the previous weekend. What's causing the recent increase in people - particularly minors - tragically dying at sea in Spain?
